text: Lesson 71 He's awful!
Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音,然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 聽錄音,然後回答這個問題。

text: How did Pauline answer the telephone at nine o'clock?
zh: 九点钟的时候,波琳是怎么接电话的?
zh_hant: 九點鐘的時候,波琳是怎麼接電話的?

text: What's Ron Marston like, Pauline?
zh: 罗恩·马斯顿是个什么样的人,波琳?
zh_hant: 羅恩·馬斯頓是個什麼樣的人,波琳?

text: He's awful!
He telephoned me four times yesterday and three times the day before yesterday.
zh: 他昨天给我打了四次电话,前天打了三次。
zh_hant: 他昨天給我打了四次電話,前天打了三次。

text: He telephoned the office yesterday morning and yesterday afternoon.
zh: 他昨天上午和下午都给办公室打了电话。
zh_hant: 他昨天上午和下午都給辦公室打了電話。

text: My boss answered the telephone.
What did your boss say to him?
He said, 'Pauline is typing letters.
She can't speak to you now!'
Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening.
zh: 后来我昨天傍晚六点到家。
zh_hant: 後來我昨天傍晚六點到家。

text: He telephoned again.
But I didn't answer the phone!
Did he telephone again last night?
Yes, he did.
He telephoned at nine o'clock.
What did you say to him?
I said, 'This is Pauline's mother.
Please don't telephone my daughter again!'
zh: 请不要再给我女儿打电话了!'
zh_hant: 請不要再給我女兒打電話了!'

text: Did he telephone again?
No, he didn't!
